topic: SQL basics: filter, join, aggregate, CTE, window functions
External stage + `COPY INTO` from S3, semi-structured data (`VARIANT`, `LATERAL FLATTEN`)
result: 100 rows loaded from a public S3 bucket, 0 errors

topic: Time Travel, DROP + UNDROP, zero-copy clone
result: Restored deleted rows via `AT(OFFSET)`, undropped a table, proved clone independence (90 vs 100 rows)

topic: Local CSV upload wizard (UI path, not `COPY INTO`)
result: 3,745 real rows loaded from a personal Uber-trips dataset
Interactive dashboard built and deployed (see below)
Stream captured 2 inserted rows, a task moved them into a change log, stream drained to 0
Custom read-only role: `SELECT` succeeded, `INSERT` correctly rejected

topic: Snowpark: Python DataFrame API (filter/group_by/agg, window functions, lazy query plans)
result: Same rollup + top-3-per-city ranking as practice 1, expressed as chained DataFrame calls instead of SQL text; `.queries` used to confirm the generated SQL is pushed down, not computed client-side

topic: Query Profile (operator tree, bytes/partitions scanned), warehouse sizing, partition pruning
result: X-Small -> Small on the same 14M-row `CROSS JOIN`: 864ms -> 117ms (~7.4x); confirmed a ~3.7k-row table lives in a single micro-partition, so no `WHERE` clause can reduce partitions scanned

topic: Cost & usage monitoring: `WAREHOUSE_METERING_HISTORY`, resource monitors via `SHOW` + `RESULT_SCAN`, `ACCOUNT_USAGE.QUERY_HISTORY`
result: Verified the Day-1 `LEARNING_MONITOR` guardrails (50 credit quota, notify/suspend at 50%/75%/100%) are still active at 2.13 of 50 credits used

topic: Dynamic Tables: declarative, incrementally-refreshed pipelines (alternative to Streams + Tasks)
result: Inserted + deleted a test city; the automatic background refresh (TARGET_LAG=1 minute) had already applied both changes before a manual REFRESH ran, reporting "No new data". Refresh history showed 96.6% NO_DATA / 3.4% INCREMENTAL across 88 checks.
